function.name: semantic_search
function.description: Perform intelligent semantic search with TF-IDF relevance scoring and workspace chunking integration. Provides progressive search from exact matches to fuzzy matching with context preservation.

path.description: Single path (file or directory) to search. Supports workspace-relative paths.

paths.description: Array of paths to search. Supports workspace-relative paths.

file_paths.description: Array of specific file paths to search. Supports workspace-relative paths.

query.description: Search query text. Supports natural language queries and technical terms.

queries.description: Alternative: array of query strings for multi-query search.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

context_lines.description: Number of surrounding lines to include in snippets (default: 3)

include_snippets.description: Include matched snippets in output (default: true)

search_mode.description: Search mode: exact (exact matches), fuzzy (approximate), progressive (exact->fuzzy), semantic (TF-IDF ranking)

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from search (e.g., ['node_modules/**', '*.log'])

commonErrors.solution: No content matches the search query
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Try broader search terms or use find_files to locate relevant files first

commonErrors.pattern: path not found|file does not exist
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use ls to explore directory structure

commonErrors.solution: Search timed out due to large content volume
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Narrow search scope or use more specific file_types filter
